# Opinafy
> The #1 Spanish-native platform for collecting, managing, and displaying verified customer testimonials.

## About
Opinafy helps businesses collect authentic customer testimonials via customizable forms, manage them through an intuitive dashboard, and display them on any website using embeddable widgets with 100+ professional templates.

## Key Features
- Collect testimonials via text, video, audio, and photo
- 100+ widget templates (carousel, grid, wall, single, badge, popup layouts)
- Double verification system (email + company domain matching)
- Mini site for businesses without websites
- A/B testing for widget optimization
- Import from Google Maps, TripAdvisor, Trustpilot, Facebook, Yelp, Capterra, G2
- Integrations: WordPress, Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix, Squarespace, Webflow, GTM, React/Next.js

## Pricing
- Free: €0/month (1 project, 10 testimonials)
- Mini Sitio: €5/month (1 project, 20 testimonials, mini site)
- Pro: €9/month (3 projects, unlimited testimonials, all layouts)
- Business: €19/month (20 projects, video testimonials, 3 team seats)
